heading: Areas recommended for approval; character
label: 715c Areas recommended for approval; character
notes: Amendments1978— substituted “may not recommend any area” for “shall recommend no area”, incorporated existing provision in item (1) and added item (2).Pub. L. 95–5521966— struck out “game” from “migratory game birds”.Pub. L. 89–669

Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of functions of Secretary of Agriculture to Secretary of the Interior by Reorg. Plan No. II of 1939, see Transfer of Functions note set out under .section 715a of this title
amendments: Amendments1978— substituted “may not recommend any area” for “shall recommend no area”, incorporated existing provision in item (1) and added item (2).Pub. L. 95–5521966— struck out “game” from “migratory game birds”.Pub. L. 89–669

children.text: has determined that such area is necessary for the conservation of migratory birds; and
has consulted with the county or other unit of local government in which such area is located and with the Governor of the State concerned or the appropriate State agency.
